evals.prompt: I need to fetch the latest monthly inflation rate for Thailand. Please get it and save it to the database.
evals.expected_output: Agent should select the BOT API, write a temp script, execute it to save wide-format data to database/core/time_series.db, and remove the temp script.

assertions.name: Uses BOT API
assertions.description: The agent selected the BOT API as the primary source for domestic inflation data.

assertions.name: Writes to time_series.db
assertions.description: The script generated explicitly targets database/core/time_series.db.

assertions.name: Cleans up script
assertions.description: The agent removed the temporary script after execution.

evals.prompt: Get the global crude oil production data from EIA and store it.
evals.expected_output: Agent should select the EIA STEO API, write a temp script, execute it to save wide-format data to database/core/time_series.db, and remove the temp script.

assertions.name: Uses EIA API
assertions.description: The agent selected the EIA STEO API for global petroleum data.

assertions.name: Wide Format
assertions.description: The agent ensures the data is pivoted to wide format (Index = Date, Columns = Series).
